batches.objective: Build the first source-backed TI FPD-Link display egress lane from serializer to display deserializer.
acceptance_criteria: Each device has a formal datasheet source, not just roadmap evidence.
Each device is modeled with system_path=domain_controller_to_display.
Serializer and deserializer roles are represented explicitly.
Display-side video protocols are source-backed before activation.

devices.reason: DSI to FPD-Link display egress entry point; useful anchor for DSI-based display path.
DisplayPort to FPD-Link serializer; key high-bandwidth display egress variant.
FPD-Link to eDP/DP deserializer; natural pair with UH983.
FPD-Link to oLDI deserializer; covers legacy and panel-facing display path.

blocking_dependencies: Formal datasheet PDFs are not yet present in the local raw source set.
No source-backed extracted/export/selection files exist yet.

batches.objective: Build the first source-backed ADI GMSL IVI display egress lane around DP/eDP parts.
acceptance_criteria: At least one serializer and one deserializer are promoted from roadmap watchlist to active profile.
DisplayPort/eDP protocols are modeled as display egress, not camera ingress.
Roadmap-only assumptions are replaced by source-backed facts.

devices.reason: DisplayPort serializer family anchor from IVI roadmap.
Companion DP serializer variant on the same roadmap.
eDP/DP deserializer family anchor from IVI roadmap.
Companion eDP/DP deserializer variant on the same roadmap.

blocking_dependencies: Formal datasheet PDFs are not yet present in the local raw source set.
No source-backed extracted/export/selection files exist yet.

batches.objective: Broaden display egress coverage after the first TI and ADI lanes are source-backed.
acceptance_criteria: At least one HDMI path, one DSI path, and one display CSI or oLDI path are represented.
No roadmap-only device is activated without formal source intake.
blocking_dependencies: Depends on completion of the priority-1 and priority-2 display egress source intake.
